import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut s = 1
match parts.get(0)
when Some(v)
  match string.parse_int(v)
  when Some(n)
    a = n
  when None
    a = 0
  end
when None
  a = 0
end
match parts.get(1)
when Some(v)
  match string.parse_int(v)
  when Some(n)
    b = n
  when None
    b = 0
  end
when None
  b = 0
end
match parts.get(2)
when Some(v)
  match string.parse_int(v)
  when Some(n)
    s = n
  when None
    s = 1
  end
when None
  s = 1
end

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
